interface.shortDescription: Run Codex as a secretary-routed development team.
interface.longDescription: CXWorkflow provides a reusable workflow for coordinating specialized Codex sessions such as Commander, Secretary, Developer, Tester, Reporter, and Observer. Secretary is the single source of truth and Commander inbox: all non-Commander sessions use a structured message format, Secretary filters by severity and forwarding thresholds, maintains the task state machine, and forwards concise briefs so Commander can focus on planning and scheduling.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me set up a CXWorkflow Codex development team for this project.
